chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No. D-7550 of 2022 Date Order with Signature of Judge 1. For order on CMA No. 4027/2025 (Urgent/A) 2. For hearing of main case 24-02-2025 Mr. Sadruddin Buriro, Advocate for the Petitioner Mr. Sandeep Malani, Assistant Advocate General 1. Urgency granted. 2. 247 Petitioners have filed this petition seeking employment in the Education Department on the basis of some competitive process concluded in 2012. Prima facie the petition is barred by laches, hence dismissed. Judge Judge Amjad PS
